title: Premium Gen-Z Commercial Advertising Poster
sourceTitle: Gen Z Chocolate Milkshake Commercial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Premium Gen-Z commercial advertising poster for Chocolate Milkshake brand, built around the headline SIP THE CHOCOLATE BLISS. Subject: oversized Chocolate Milkshake bottle and cup with rich chocolate splash and condensation droplets dominates the right side as an oversized realistic packaging render with rich chocolate splash effects, condensation droplets, and high-detail branding visibility, while stylish young lifestyle model sitting lower-center, smiling while holding a milkshake and looking excited adds youthful lifestyle energy. Scene: Modern ecommerce campaign visual with wavy patterned background texture, floating dashed motion accents, premium FMCG identity, playful editorial composition, and social-media branding energy. Composition: Vertical asymmetrical layout: large stacked typography on the left reading SIP THE CHOCOLATE BLISS, oversized milkshake packshot on the right, model lower-center, brand logo near the top, and small supporting marketing text blocks in bottom corners. Signature Elements: Preserved gen z chocolate milkshake commercial poster source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Bold Gen-Z commercial advertising aesthetics, Behance-level poster design, Pinterest-trending FMCG campaign look, vibrant color blocking, premium commercial realism, and playful high-impact social ad finish. Color Palette: Chocolate browns, creamy milk highlights, bright Gen-Z accent colors, clean white hierarchy areas, rich splash tones, and vivid commercial color blocking. Lighting: Bright commercial studio lighting, soft realistic product shadows, glossy chocolate splash highlights, condensation sparkle, and clean model illumination. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
